intro: Did you bring your character sheet this time? We can’t start the game if you don’t know who your character is…anyway…we have an item to retrieve, do you accept this quest?
description:
Fetch Quest Remastered is a visual novel that expands the hit game Fetch Quest with more content, upgraded graphics and unlockable extras through different story routes.

Would-be adventurer Flora accepts a job to retrieve a stolen item for a shady bartender. To retrieve the item, she'll have to infiltrate a group of notorious bandits by posing as a new recruit.

Fortunately, she has the help of two other adventurers…
…unfortunately, they are completely useless without her!

According to the strangely vocal narrator, this would have gone more smoothly if everyone had remembered to make their characters beforehand...

Join Flora and her (poorly-prepared) companions Connor and Todd on their role-playing (mis)adventure and help them complete the quest that their resourceful Dungeon Master has planned for them. 

Features:
- Discover multiple endings depending on your choices in-game
- Enjoy the game remastered with HD graphics and illustrations
- Follow your heart and choose between two love interests
- Unlock additional content through your choices
- A new True Ending that leads into a sequel
- ~2 hours of reading time
- 1 internet meme
